from transformers import AutoTokenizer

tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained("bert-base-uncased")

def score_documents(documents: list[str]) -> list[float]:
    scores = []
    for doc in documents:
        tokens = tokenizer.encode(doc, max_length=512, truncation=True)
        score = len(tokens) / 512.0
        scores.append(score)
    return scores

def filter_by_token_count(texts: list[str], limit: int = 256) -> list[str]:
    results = []
    for text in texts:
        encoded = tokenizer.encode(text, add_special_tokens=True)
        if len(encoded) <= limit:
            results.append(text)
    return results

def build_batch(texts: list[str]) -> dict:
    all_ids = []
    all_masks = []
    for text in texts:
        encoding = tokenizer.encode_plus(text, max_length=128, padding="max_length", truncation=True)
        all_ids.append(encoding["input_ids"])
        all_masks.append(encoding["attention_mask"])
    return {"input_ids": all_ids, "attention_mask": all_masks}
